top_signals.title: Slok Says ECB May Hike Interest Rates Again in September (Video)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Former Goldman Economist O'Neill on Burnham's UK Plan
top_signals.summary: Former Goldman Sachs economist Jim O’Neill, who has advised UK leadership contender Andy Burnham on economic matters, discusses the Labour Party MP's plan to decentralize power in a bid to boost Britain's economy. O'Neill speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Electric vehicle mandate and tariffs put carmakers ‘at risk’
top_signals.summary: Britain’s ailing car industry could be hollowed out without urgent action to tackle the twin blows of tariffs and the government’s EV mandate, the head of its industry body has warned. Speaking at the SMMT’s annual summit, boss Mike Hawes said that the so-called ZEV mandate – a policy that forces carmakers to sell a [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emirates NBD Said to Be in Talks to Buy HSBC’s Turkey Unit
top_signals.summary: Emirates NBD PJSC is in talks to buy HSBC Holdings Plc’s Turkey operations, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Michigan judge blocks Kalshi from allowing residents to place sports bets
top_signals.summary: A Michigan Judge has temporarily blocked Kalshi from offering sports betting contracts to residents, escalating the state-federal fight over prediction markets and gambling laws.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Medicare will start covering obesity drugs for the first time. Here's what patients should know
top_signals.summary: The move could unlock millions of new patients for Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly and expand access to medications that were previously out of reach for seniors.
